name: Hawaian Glazed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chicken and sesame seeds in a bowl.
2. Brush the mixture onto the chicken breast side down.
3. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
4. Turn and baste the chicken, then bake for another 1/2 hour at 375°F.
5. Brush with sauce or honey.
6. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
7. Bake until the sesame seeds are browned.
8. Skim fat from drippings if necessary and thicken with cornstarch, if desired.
